description: You are the HMIS officer for Ngelehun CHC, a health facility in Bo District, Sierra Leone. Submit the monthly health report for October 2023 to the district using DHIS2 at http://localhost:8080 (admin/district). Enter at least 5 realistic data values for a small rural facility serving approximately 5,000 people into an appropriate health dataset for the facility (such as child health, primary health care, reproductive health, or disease surveillance). Ensure the data passes validation analysis and mark the dataset as complete for the October 2023 period.
